speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Six. You’ve learned how to avoid punches. You’ve learned how to stay balanced. Now we connect defence to action. Defence isn’t the end of a movement. It’s the beginning of the next one. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Session Six. Today we make defence active. You won’t stay still after you move. You’ll respond. Nothing rushed. Nothing wild. If this feels like a step up, that’s because it is. But you’re ready.

speaker: MAC
text: Start in stance. Hands up. We’re warming up level changes. Think of riding gentle waves. You rise. You fall. But you stay centred. After me. Set of four. Down. Up. One. Down. Up. Two. Down. Up. Three. Down. Up. Four. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Settle.

speaker: MAC
text: Quick reminder. The roll isn’t a dip of the head. It’s a bend of the legs. Your back stays tall. Your eyes stay forward. You’re moving under trouble, not away from it.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Set of four. Roll left. One. Roll right. Two. Roll left. Three. Roll right. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stay loose.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we add the response. When you roll, your body is already loaded. Like drawing back a rubber band. You don’t pause. You release. Roll. Hook. After me. Set of four. Roll. Hook. One. Roll. Hook. Two. Roll. Hook. Three. Roll. Hook. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Hands down briefly.

speaker: MAC
text: Same idea. Different exit. Roll the other way. Cross comes straight through. You don’t chase the punch. You meet the opening. After me. Set of four. Roll. Cross. One. Roll. Cross. Two. Roll. Cross. Three. Roll. Cross. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Shake it out.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we flow it. Slip. Roll. Punch. One movement. Then the next. After me. Set of four. Slip. Roll. Hook. One. Slip. Roll. Hook. Two. Slip. Roll. Hook. Three. Slip. Roll. Hook. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Let the arms hang.

speaker: MAC
text: Take a breath. You didn’t rush. You stayed organised. Defence is no longer a pause. It’s part of the conversation. Well done.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Six complete. You’re starting to choose your moments, not react to them. That’s control. Session Seven builds movement and angles. Rest up.
